description.value: Price 3,410 gp; Slot armor; CL 3rd; Weight 7 lbs.; Aura faint enchantment DESCRIPTION When unattended, djezet skin appears as a curiously smooth sphere of rust-red metal. When itâs held and a command word is spoken, the armor oozes across the wearerâs body like a second skin. The armor can be removed as a free action by stepping out of it, causing it to pool on the floor. Djezet skin acts as a suit of +1 leather, except it is made of metal (and thus druids cannot wear it) and has no armor check penalty and a 0% chance of arcane spell failure. Additionally, the wearer of djezet skin gains a +5 circumstance bonus on Diplomacy checks to make requests of creatures with an attitude of friendly or helpful. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 1,785 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells charm person
